name: The Collector | Ghosts of Tabor
description:
Yo got addicted to Tabor, first Tabor bot lets go.

The Collector is an Elite AI, wearing a unique Boss armor & wielding the Sig Sauer XM250. They have good protection, additional health and more firepower than normal Fenix. Killing The Collector will reward the player with the XM250, R61 armor with upper leg protection, a Helmet Mich boss helmet, and a green keycard for the Underground Matka Miest loot room.

He wears nothing but pants under his armor, and half of his face is covered by skull face paint. He also has a (likely unuseful) GPS on his wrist. BTW don't die my allies.
creator: BenOnYoutubeZ
